uplink.description: Status report: contact closed (On), shock/tamper alarm, low battery, distance 1234mm, fill 55%, low-distance + low-fill alarms
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; byte 4 = 0x80|123 (low-battery flag + 12.3 V), byte 5 = 0x01 (On -> closed), bytes 6..7 = 1234 mm, byte 8 = 55%, byte 9 = 0b0101 (low-distance + low-fill), byte 10 = 0x01 (shock alarm). Expected verified against reference/upstream-codec.js field decode.

uplink.description: Status report: contact open (Off), no shock, distance 300mm, fill 0%, no alarms, battery 3.0V
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; byte 4 = 30 (3.0 V, no low-battery bit), byte 5 = 0x00 (Off -> open), bytes 6..7 = 300 mm, byte 8 = 0, byte 9 = 0 (no alarms), byte 10 = 0x00 (no shock). Expected verified against reference/upstream-codec.js field decode.

uplink.description: Startup / device-info frame (reportType 0x00) carries no measurement
uplink._note: Upstream example startup version report; reportType byte 3 == 0x00. No normalized measurement.

uplink.description: Config response on fPort 23 is not a data report
uplink._note: Upstream ConfigReportRsp example; fPort 23 carries config responses, no measurement.

uplink.description: Truncated data frame (too few bytes) is an error
uplink._note: Synthetic truncated fPort-22 frame to exercise the length guard.
